content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "The Fair Nut and Rectangles". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/1083/problem/E
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, the number of rectangles. Then n lines follow, each containing four integers: x1, y1, x2, y2, representing the coordinates of the rectangle's bottom-left and top-right corners.
content.outputFormat: The output should be a single integer, the maximum number of rectangles that can be painted.
